title: Viewer cockpit surfaces repo intelligence reports
summary: Kage viewer should generate and load .agent memory/reports JSON for risk, module health, graph insights, workspace, quality, and benchmark, then show them as a Repo Intelligence cockpit. Risk reports now include co chang
body: Kage viewer should generate and load .agent_memory/reports JSON for risk, module health, graph insights, workspace, quality, and benchmark, then show them as a Repo Intelligence cockpit. Risk reports now include co-change warnings and ownership silos; graph insights include language coverage and edge mix so index gaps are visible.
